# clang trunk: unreachable "Type not integer, floating, or complex" in getAbsoluteValueKind during Sema check of labs() on __m64 MMX vector type

**Author:** Theaamadu
**URL:** https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/173920
**Status:** Closed
**Labels:** duplicate, clang:frontend, crash, generated by fuzzer
**Closed Date:** 2025-12-29T20:20:46Z

## Body

## Compiler Explorer: https://godbolt.org/z/GxvKMvdxr

- clang start crashing on `Trunk`
- generated by fuzzer

## Code
```c
#include <mmintrin.h>
__m64 x;
__m64 y;
unsigned long long foo(__m64 m) { long l1 = labs(x); }
```
